title: Import Sections Request
description: Request schema for importing sections to a page or parent section. Supports the minimized export shape: omitted fields fall back to styles_fields.default_value at render time.

section_name.description: Optional section name. When missing, the backend auto-assigns one based on the style.

style_name.description: The name of the style to use for the section. Required.

fields.description: Translatable / property fields. Only fields that differ from their style default should be present.

content.description: Field content. Omit the entire entry when equal to the style default. NOTE: `null` is accepted by the schema for forward-compat with older exporters, but the backend normalizes it to an empty string before persisting (the underlying column is NOT NULL).

meta.description: Optional meta payload (JSON-encoded). Omit when null.

global_fields.description: Section-level non-translatable fields (condition, data_config, css, css_mobile, debug). All keys optional.

children.description: Child sections to import. Omit when empty.

position.description: The position where the sections should be inserted
